# WELCOME TO 619 BRICKELL

Nobu Hospitality proudly announces its first residential project in Miami—619 Brickell, a new architectural landmark along Biscayne Bay designed by the world-renowned Foster + Partners in collaboration with Sieger-Suarez Architects. Developed with 13th Floor Investments and Key International, the 74-story tower will offer 300 residences and 90,000 sq. ft. of private amenities, including a full-service spa and wellness retreat, state-of-the-art fitness center, and serene poolside café—all reflecting Nobu’s refined Japanese-inspired elegance and elevated service. At ground level, Miami’s second Nobu restaurant will debut with a distinctive circular design and breathtaking waterfront views, creating a seamless connection between home and hospitality.

![](https://www.nobuhotels.com/content/uploads/2025/11/Brickell2-1.jpg)

IN THE NEWS

Stay updated with the latest news on 619 Brickell.

[Press Inquiries](mailto:press@nobuhotels.com "Press Inquiries")

# 619 Brickell

619 Brickell Ave Miami FL 33131

619 Brickell by Foster + Partners & Nobu Hospitality is an ultra-luxury bayfront condominium rising in the heart of [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"), developed by 13th Floor Investments and Key International. The striking 74-story tower features Foster + Partners as concept architect, with Sieger-Suarez Architects as architect of record. Expected in 2030, it will offer just 306 exclusive residences, positioning 619 Brickell among the most exclusive residential offerings ever introduced along the Biscayne Bay waterfront.

## 619 Brickell Residences

The residences at 619 Brickell range from one-bedroom plus den layouts to expansive four-bedroom homes, including 19 Sky Villas and 4 Penthouses. The interiors are defined by 10-foot ceilings, floor-to-ceiling glass, and expansive wraparound terraces—many with outdoor summer kitchens. Every residence at 619 Brickell is outfitted with Gaggenau kitchens, smart home automation, medical-grade HEPA air purification, ozone-enhanced whole-home water systems, circadian lighting, and low-EMF grounded interiors, while the living rooms and primary suites are oriented to capture sweeping, unobstructed views of Biscayne Bay, the Miami skyline, and dramatic sunrise and sunset vistas.

## 619 Brickell Amenities

The amenities at 619 Brickell span more than 90,000 square feet and are centered around wellness, longevity, and elevated lifestyle services in partnership with Nobu Hospitality. Residents will enjoy a full Nobu Spa & Longevity Suite featuring cryotherapy, hyperbaric oxygen therapy, infrared and red-light therapy, IV and peptide therapy, meditation pods, and recovery lounges. Additional offerings at 619 Brickell include thermal and hydro rituals, a panoramic fitness center, padel court, multiple resort-style pool decks, Japanese zen gardens, private cabanas, wine cellar, Owners’ Lounge, tea lounge, library salon, executive suites, and boardroom. The five-star concierge and lifestyle management services include wellness coordination, housekeeping, butler services, childcare, pet care, chauffeur and house car access, and global dining and event privileges through Nobu.

## 619 Brickell Location

Located directly on the bayfront at 619 Brickell Avenue, 619 Brickell condominium enjoys a premier waterfront address with immediate access to Biscayne Bay, the Brickell Financial District, and Miami’s most desirable cultural and lifestyle destinations. Residents of 619 Brickell will be moments from Brickell City Centre, Mary Brickell Village, world-class dining, marinas, and waterfront promenades, while Downtown Miami, Coconut Grove, Miami Beach, and Key Biscayne are all a short drive away—making the location ideal for both walkability and seamless connectivity across the city.

**For 619 Brickell pricing, floor plans, and availability, email me at [lucas@miamicondoinvestments.com](mailto:lucas@miamicondoinvestments.com).**
